components.name: Tuner (RTL-FM Process Manager)
components.description: Manages rtl_fm subprocess lifecycle — start/stop/retune, reads raw PCM from stdout, distributes to audio and whisper queues

components.name: Stream Source (Web Stream Ingest)
components.description: Pulls live audio from public internet streams (LiveATC, NOAA) via ffmpeg subprocess, converts to 16kHz mono PCM for the pipeline

components.name: Input Source Abstraction
components.description: Unified interface wrapping Tuner (SDR) and StreamSource (web stream) behind a common PCM queue — downstream components are source-agnostic

components.name: Transcriber (Hailo Whisper)
components.description: Reads PCM from whisper queue, accumulates 10-second chunks (160k samples), runs silence detection, performs Whisper inference on Hailo-8L NPU via encoder/decoder HEF pipeline with repetition penalty, or faster-whisper CPU fallback
components.notes: Hailo inference implemented 2026-02-24. Uses VDevice/InferModel API with whisper-tiny encoder (10s) + decoder (32 tokens). mel.py provides log-mel spectrogram. Models downloaded via scripts/download_models.sh.

components.name: Audio Router (HTTP Streaming)
components.description: Reads PCM from audio queue, wraps in streaming WAV headers, serves as chunked HTTP response for browser audio playback

components.name: Flask Application (Backend API)
components.description: Flask + Flask-SocketIO server — REST API routes for tuning/control, WebSocket events for real-time transcript/status/signal delivery, thread orchestration

components.name: Frontend (Console UI)
components.description: Single-page web interface — preset selector, signal meter, audio player, transcript feed, squelch/gain controls. Vanilla JS + Web Audio API + Socket.IO client

components.name: Frequency Presets
components.description: Preset definitions for SDR frequencies and web stream URLs — weather, aviation, marine, public safety, broadcast categories for the Redmond/Seattle area

components.name: Mel Spectrogram Utility
components.description: Log-mel spectrogram computation for Hailo Whisper encoder input. 80 mel bins, STFT n_fft=400, hop=160, 10s chunks (1000 frames). Uses pre-computed mel_filters.npz.

components.name: NOAA Weather Parser
components.description: Structured parser for NWS weather radio broadcasts — extracts temperature, wind, humidity, visibility, marine forecasts, and priority alerts (warnings/watches) from Whisper transcripts using regex patterns

components.name: APT Pass Scheduler
components.description: Satellite pass prediction for NOAA-15/19 using PyEphem orbital mechanics and Celestrak TLEs. 24h lookahead, 20° minimum elevation filter, background scheduling loop with 10-minute advance notification via Socket.IO

components.name: APT Image Decoder
components.description: Records NOAA APT satellite passes using rtl_fm (137 MHz wideband FM, 60k sample rate, 11025 Hz output) piped to sox for WAV conversion, then decodes with noaa-apt CLI to PNG. Manages image storage and history

components.name: WEFAX Broadcast Scheduler
components.description: Parses NMC Point Reyes and NOJ Kodiak broadcast schedules, selects optimal HF frequency based on time of day, triggers recording jobs at scheduled broadcast times with 5-minute advance notification

components.name: WEFAX Receiver & Decoder
components.description: Records HF WEFAX broadcasts using rtl_fm with Q-branch direct sampling (-D 2) and USB demodulation, decodes with fldigi via Xvfb headless. Structured PNG output with station/frequency/chart metadata

components.name: Meteor Scatter Detector
components.description: Forward scatter power monitor using rtl_fm on carrier frequency. Rolling 30s baseline, threshold-based burst detection, duration filtering (50ms-30s), underdense/overdense trail classification. Supports dual dongle mode for 24/7 monitoring

components.name: Meteor Statistics Analyzer
components.description: Shower calendar with 7 major annual showers, active shower correlation on detections, hourly/daily rate calculation, session statistics with peak rate and underdense/overdense ratio
